# User Story - US_007

## Story ID

* ID Format: US_007

## Story Title

* OpenAPI/Swagger Documentation Setup

## Description

* As a **developer**, I want auto-generated OpenAPI 3.0 documentation via Swashbuckle with interactive Swagger UI, so that API endpoints are discoverable, testable, and documented without manual effort.

## Acceptance Criteria

* Given the API project is running, When navigating to `/swagger`, Then the Swagger UI MUST render with all registered API endpoints grouped by controller.
* Given Swashbuckle is configured, When the API is built, Then an OpenAPI 3.0 specification file MUST be generated with versioned endpoints (v1/).
* Given an API endpoint has XML documentation comments, When viewing the Swagger UI, Then the endpoint description, parameters, and response schemas MUST be populated from the XML comments.
* Given JWT authentication is configured, When using the Swagger UI, Then an "Authorize" button MUST allow entering a Bearer token for testing authenticated endpoints.
* Given the OpenAPI spec is generated, When inspecting the JSON output, Then all request/response DTOs MUST have their property types and validation constraints documented.

## Edge Cases

* What happens when an endpoint is missing XML documentation? Swagger UI MUST still display the endpoint with auto-generated parameter names and types without crashing.
* How does the system handle API versioning? The Swagger UI MUST support version selection if multiple API versions exist.
